metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the payments-and-revenue-infrastructure domain.

rootGroups.name: Merchant Payments
rootGroups.description: Buyer-facing payment acceptance and conversion capabilities.

bricks.name: Hosted Checkout
bricks.description: Hosted payment session experience optimized for fast launch and ongoing conversion improvements.

internalModules.title: Session orchestration
internalModules.description: Creates and manages buyer-facing hosted payment sessions.

interfaces.title: Hosted buyer payment UI

Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.

Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
